content.full_text:
May 8, 2002

Michael J. Alexander
710 La Para Avenue
Palo Alto, CA 94306

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. A-02-104

Dear Mr. Alexander:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation of May 7, 2002, you have rescinded your request for written advice.

If you have any additional questions, please feel free to call me toll-free at 866/275-3772.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Kevin S. Moen, PhD
Political Reform Consultant II
Technical Assistance Division
